seo.title: Script to Trailer – AI Movie Trailer Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Transform screenplay ideas into trailer-ready storyboards with AI and quickly prototype cinematic teaser sequences.

hero.title: Script to Trailer
hero.description: Supercharge your film promotion with our AI-powered workflow template. Paste in your screenplay, and the AI turns it into compelling trailer storyboards that capture the essence of your story.

steps.title: Extract key beats from your script
steps.description: Paste in the most important scenes, lines, or moments that should appear in your trailer, along with genre and tone notes.

steps.title: Define the trailer structure and pacing
steps.description: Highlight opening hooks, mid-trailer reveals, and final punchlines so the workflow can emphasize your core beats.

steps.title: Generate AI trailer storyboard visuals
steps.description: Run the Script to Trailer template to produce visual sequences that outline how your trailer could look and feel.

steps.title: Iterate on beats and reuse the workflow
steps.description: Adjust which scenes you include, refine your prompts, and reuse the project to explore alternate trailer directions.

whoIsFor.title: Built for high-impact trailers
whoIsFor.subtitle: From feature films to web series, see who uses AI trailer storyboards to promote their stories.

items.question: What is the Script to Trailer AI workflow?
items.answer: Script to Trailer is an AI movie trailer generator template that converts your screenplay or outline into cinematic trailer storyboards and video snippets.

items.question: How is this different from Script to Film?
items.answer: Script to Trailer focuses on highlight moments, pacing, and emotional peaks rather than every scene. It’s optimized for attention-grabbing trailers and promotion, not full scene-by-scene coverage.

items.question: What inputs do I need to start?
items.answer: Paste key scenes, loglines, or selected pages from your script, along with style notes (e.g., ‘epic blockbuster,’ ‘intimate indie drama’). The workflow uses these to structure trailer beats.

items.question: Does the template handle different genres?
items.answer: Yes. You can use it for action, horror, sci-fi, romance, or any genre by indicating tone and style. Genre-specific prompts help the AI choose appropriate visual language.

items.question: Can I use this for film promotion campaigns?
items.answer: Yes. The trailer storyboard and clips are great for early marketing, pitch decks, and social teasers. You can refine or reshoot them later with your production team.

items.question: How long is a typical AI trailer generated by this workflow?
items.answer: Most users generate short sequences that feel like 15–90 second trailers. You can adjust length by selecting how many key beats or scenes you want to include.

items.question: Do I own the trailer concepts generated with my script?
items.answer: You retain rights to your script. AI outputs can usually be used within the terms of your OpenCreator account and the model policies, but you should review those terms before large-scale campaigns.
